questions.text: Which of the following is a factor of 24?
questions.explanation: Factors of 24 are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 24. Among the options, only 8 divides 24 exactly.
LCM (Least Common Multiple) of 4 and 6 is 12, as it is the smallest number divisible by both 4 and 6.

questions.text: What is the HCF of 12 and 18?
questions.explanation: HCF (Highest Common Factor) of 12 and 18 is 6. Factors of 12: 1,2,3,4,6,12. Factors of 18: 1,2,3,6,9,18. Common factors: 1,2,3,6. Highest is 6.

questions.text: A number that has exactly two factors (1 and itself) is called a ________ number.
questions.explanation: A prime number has exactly two factors: 1 and the number itself. Examples: 2, 3, 5, 7, 11, etc.
